About InTrainin

Training that translates to employment outcomes

InTrainin is purpose-built for informal sector workers and employers who need a practical, trusted path from skills development to better jobs.

Mission
Help workers get trained, certified, and employed faster through structured role-specific learning.
Market
Starting in Nigeria with planned expansion into Ghana, Kenya, and Uganda.
Approach
Web-first PWA, modular architecture, and clear learning-to-hiring product loops.

InTrainin

Structured training, trusted certification, better employment outcomes.

RolesBusinessJob HubAbout
